name: @agentkit/chat-ui
description: React components that render an agent chat from its event stream — the single agentEventReducer plus chat UI, generalised from Platinum's frontend agent components. See ../docs/09-frontend-components.md.
comment: No dependency on Platinum app state, routing, or contexts. Carbon table/chart/dashboard widgets stay in Platinum and register as RenderPlugins. Source of the copy is the Platinum repo's frontend/src/ per ../docs/90-provenance-map.md.
